entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT NOT NULL, `abstract` TEXT NOT NULL, `authors_line` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`papers`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_papers_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `papers` BEGIN DELETE FROM `papers_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_papers_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `papers` BEGIN DELETE FROM `papers_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_papers_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `papers` BEGIN INSERT INTO `papers_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `abstract`, `authors_line`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`abstract`, NEW.`authors_line`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_papers_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `papers` BEGIN INSERT INTO `papers_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `abstract`, `authors_line`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`abstract`, NEW.`authors_line`); END

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`content` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`notes`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_notes_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `notes` BEGIN DELETE FROM `notes_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_notes_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `notes` BEGIN DELETE FROM `notes_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_notes_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `notes` BEGIN INSERT INTO `notes_fts`(`docid`, `content`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`content`); END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_notes_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `notes` BEGIN INSERT INTO `notes_fts`(`docid`, `content`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`content`); END
